assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets options.KeyManagement.Enabled = true (or does not set it to false, since true is the default)
assertions.rationale: A general LLM would likely enable key management when asked to enable it.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddSigningCredential with the result of GetSigningKeyFromVault() and an algorithm (e.g. RS256)
assertions.rationale: A general LLM might not know that AddSigningCredential takes precedence over automatic keys when both are configured.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs does NOT call AddValidationKey for the static key (that is Phase 2, not Phase 1)
assertions.rationale: Without knowing the phased migration approach, a general LLM might incorrectly add AddValidationKey.

assertions.assertion: The code includes a comment or is structured to indicate this is Phase 1 of migration from static to automatic key management
assertions.rationale: A general LLM would not know the Duende-specific phased migration strategy.
